or":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.4"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7603745856746949656","book_info":{"abstract":"【系统+躺平挂机+反套路+杀伐果断+不压境界】
秦尘穿越大周王朝，开局被绑入长公主府当驸马，而长公主是个狠人，已经杀了十多个驸马。
更糟的是，大道仙骨气运也被堂弟转嫁，被夺取了多年武道修为。
天崩之局，秦尘以为必死无疑，却绑定仙帝挂机系统，挂机就能变强。
【勾栏挂机，奖励九龙伐天术】
【女子国师府挂机，奖励帝术三绝】
【女帝宫挂机，奖励至尊帝瞳】
……
从此秦尘凭借躺平挂机，修帝道之体，炼不朽帝术，成了人间神话，举世无敌。
堂弟：“大哥，我不想死，我把修为还你，求求你别杀我！”
女子国师：“秦尘，我的业火要压不住了！”
长公主：“夫君，朝堂上那些清流又催朕立储君了，可朕的肚子……”
……
多年后。
新帝无道，邪魔入侵，满朝跪求长公主出手。
长公主冷笑：“问我作甚？去问后面晒太阳那位。”
那位“躺平驸马”，缓缓睁开眼眸——瞳中映出万里星河，身后九条祖龙虚影裂空而起。
那一身无敌修为……
这一刻，淹没了整座人间。
“秦天帝在此，请天上诸神，地下邪魔……赴死！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/00650738a83a14f666107a3c6607c2a5~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"嬴稷","author_id":"","book_id":"7603745856746949656","book_name":"开局入赘女魔头，我挂机成仙帝","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#381008","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7603745909318353432","read_count":"25394","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"130797"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"61","tags":"玄幻脑洞,东方玄幻,开局,女帝,系统,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/00650738a83a14f666107a3c6607c2a5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779255107&x-signature=c0odh0dOfttYzLicgqMFlLYHvwU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"111582240472","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"27"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211331479B6A556FF1199DCCF49C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":
